div.p: I'm a full-stack developer and designer crafting beautiful, functional digital experiences. Explore my work and connect with me across platforms.

Technologies and tools I work with daily
My professional journey and academic background
Leading frontend development team, implementing modern web applications, and mentoring junior developers.
Developed and maintained multiple web applications, implemented REST APIs, and optimized database performance.
Created responsive websites and web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and CSS preprocessors.
Graduated with honors, specialized in web development and software engineering principles.
Some of my recent work and personal projects
Real-time analytics dashboard with AI-powered insights and beautiful visualizations.
Mobile app for tracking carbon footprint with personalized recommendations.
Online marketplace for local artisans with integrated payment system.
Subscribe to my newsletter for the latest updates, projects, and insights
